summary: Iteration 70 - Complete testing of B2B Platform NeXifyAI fixes: Webhooks field mapping, View persistence, Stats API expansion, Dashboard 8 stat cards, Chat Leitstelle (control panel), Quick actions. ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (15/15). ALL UI TESTS PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Dashboard has 8 stat cards (Leads gesamt, Neue Leads, Kontakte, Angebote, Verträge, Rechnungen, Buchungen, Chat-Sessions). NeXify AI Chat has 3-column layout with control panel (nxai-control) showing System-Status, KI-Agenten, Schnellaktionen, Proaktiv, Verbindung. Webhooks show events with processed_at, event, order_id fields and VERARBEITET status. View persistence uses localStorage key 'nx_admin_view'. Quick actions fill chat input via setNxInput().

view_persistence.test_result: After navigating to nexify_ai and reloading, view persisted correctly

quick_action_fills_input.test_result: Clicking quick action filled input with: 'Erstelle ein Morgen-Briefing: Neue Leads, offene A...'

navigation_views.monitoring: VERIFIED - 13 system cards with status indicators
navigation_views.agents: VERIFIED - 10 agent cards, proactive mode section found
navigation_views.commercial: VERIFIED - Quotes and Invoices sections visible
navigation_views.webhooks: VERIFIED - Events table with correct field mapping

playwright_test_results.admin_login_flow: PASS - Email → Role Selection → Password → Dashboard
playwright_test_results.dashboard_8_stat_cards: PASS - All 8 cards found with real data
playwright_test_results.control_panel_sections: PASS - All 5 sections verified (System-Status, KI-Agenten, Schnellaktionen, Proaktiv, Verbindung)
playwright_test_results.view_persistence: PASS - localStorage nx_admin_view persists after reload
playwright_test_results.webhooks_view: PASS - Events with timestamps, event types, order IDs, VERARBEITET status
playwright_test_results.monitoring_view: PASS - 13 system cards with status indicators
playwright_test_results.agents_view: PASS - 10 agent cards, proactive mode section

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (Arcee AI trinity-large-preview, mem0 Brain, DeepSeek LLM)
